title: C++
description: Systems programming. Memory management, STL, pointers, OOP, templates, and performance optimization.

title: CSS
description: Style the web. Flexbox, Grid, animations, responsive design, variables, preprocessors, and modern layouts.

title: Database
description: SQL, NoSQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, indexing, queries, normalization, and data modeling.

title: Bash/Shell
description: Master shell scripting. Variables, conditionals, loops, functions, grep, sed, awk, automation scripts, and best practices.

title: DevOps
description: CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, cloud services, monitoring, infrastructure as code, and automation.

title: Docker
description: Containerization. Images, containers, Dockerfile, Compose, volumes, networking, and orchestration.

title: Git
description: Version control mastery. Commits, branches, merging, remotes, GitHub, collaboration workflows, and advanced Git.

title: HTML
description: Structure the web. Semantic elements, forms, tables, media, SEO, accessibility, and best practices.

title: Java
description: Enterprise programming. OOP, collections, streams, multithreading, Spring Boot, and JVM ecosystem.

title: JavaScript
description: Master the language of the web. ES6+, closures, promises, async/await, DOM manipulation, and more.

title: Linux
description: From zero to hero. File system, permissions, processes, networking, shell scripting, and system admin.

title: Machine Learning
description: Python, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, neural networks, NLP, computer vision, and model deployment.

title: Node.js
description: Server-side JavaScript. Express, file system, streams, modules, npm, REST APIs, and real-time apps.

title: Python
description: Versatile programming. Data structures, OOP, modules, file I/O, web frameworks, automation and scripting.

title: React
description: Build modern UIs. Hooks, state management, context API, Next.js, server components, and patterns.

title: React Native
description: Cross-platform mobile apps. Navigation, native APIs, performance optimization, and deployment.

title: SQL
description: Database queries. SELECT, JOIN, subqueries, indexes, transactions, normalization, and performance tuning.

title: TypeScript
description: Type-safe JavaScript. Interfaces, generics, enums, type inference, advanced types & patterns.
